ocr_findings.description: Section header '試験にはコレが出る！' rendered as '試験にはつしが出る！' in OCR — the mascot icon text 'コレ' misread as 'つし', changing the meaning of the heading.
'完璧に暗記する必要はない' section icon (a prohibition circle symbol) rendered as '5' in OCR — cosmetic issue, section heading text itself is correct.
Inner typographic quotation marks around '機会' in the phrase 'その情報で不正アクセスできる"機会"を持っている' not fully preserved in OCR — minor punctuation loss, meaning unaffected.

reviewer_notes: Content page covering 機密性/完全性/可用性 summary box, 情報セキュリティマネジメントの特性 sidebar, 不正のトライアングル sidebar, and 完璧に暗記する必要はない tip. Main finding is the section title icon misread ('コレ' → 'つし'); all substantive body text is faithfully captured.
